sql_array: CREATE TABLE volumes (vol_id VARCHAR(20) PRIMARY KEY, size INT, region VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE snapshots (snapshot_id VARCHAR(20), vol_id VARCHAR(20), created_at TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (vol_id) REFERENCES volumes(vol_id));

SELECT v.vol_id, 
       CASE WHEN s.snapshot_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'exists' ELSE 'not exists' END AS snapshot_status
FROM volumes v
LEFT JOIN snapshots s ON v.vol_id = s.vol_id
WHERE bif:st_within(POINT(1, 1), POINT(1, 1)) IS TRUE;
INSERT INTO snapshots VALUES ('snap-0002', 'vol-1a2b3c4d', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(size) FROM volumes GROUP BY region HAVING AVG(size) > 50;

SELECT v.vol_id, COALESCE(MAX(s.created_at), 'no snapshots') AS last_snapshot FROM volumes v LEFT JOIN snapshots s ON v.vol_id = s.vol_id GROUP BY v.vol_id HAVING COALESCE(MAX(s.created_at), 'no snapshots') <> 'no snapshots';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_volumes AS SELECT vol_id, size FROM volumes WHERE size IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.vol_id, t.size, DB.DBA.AMAZON_CREATE_SNAPSHOT(access_key, t.vol_id, sec_token) FROM temp_volumes t;
DELETE FROM snapshots WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS';
